compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect Java first-class language support
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and any existing docs that describe supported stacks (excluding Java) to reflect that java-maven and java-gradle are now first-class supported stacks. Document the commands.* defaults and wrapper detection behavior.

**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md (stack detection notes, supported stacks list); CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (if Java docs not fully covered by F1's SC changes); KNOWN-ISSUES.md (if issues surfaced during implementation)
- OUT: Creating new docs; modifying detect-stack.sh (Story F1 handles that)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md or equivalent docs accurately list java-maven and java-gradle as supported stacks with their detection markers (pom.xml, build.gradle)
  ← Satisfies: documentation accuracy post-implementation
- When this story is complete, the wrapper detection logic (mvnw > mvn, gradlew > gradle) is documented in the appropriate configuration or architecture reference

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude
